title: Project structure
description: Create the initial Python project structure with pyproject.toml, src, tests and CLI entry point.

title: Basic expression parser
description: Implement parsing and evaluation of +, -, * and / expressions.

title: Error handling
description: Handle division by zero, invalid expressions and display user-friendly error messages.

title: Operator precedence
description: Support parentheses and correct operator precedence.

title: Calculation history
description: Store previous calculations and implement the history command.

title: Memory functions
description: Implement M+, M-, MR and MC commands.

title: CLI improvements
description: Implement help, clear and exit commands.

title: Testing
description: Add unit tests, edge case tests and integration tests.

title: Documentation
description: Write README with installation and usage examples.

title: Release 1.0
description: Ensure all tests pass and prepare the first release.
